name: cli-notice-codex
description: Native Codex voice reminders for approval moments and task completion on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Speak approval and completion reminders in Codex
interface.longDescription: Adds native macOS voice reminders to Codex CLI with best-effort approval alerts and task completion announcements through the Codex hooks system.
defaultPrompt: Explain how to enable CLI Notice voice reminders in Codex
